root.sql: select sc_lon_m_contract.loan_contract_no , sc_lon_m_contract.membership_no , pka_com_function.fp_get_member_name ( sc_lon_m_contract.membership_no ) as member_name , pka_com_function.fp_get_group_name ( sc_lon_m_contract.member_group_no ) as group_name , pka_com_function.fp_get_member_sharestock ( sc_lon_m_contract.membership_no ) as share_stock , pka_com_function.fp_get_moneythai ( sc_lon_m_contract.loan_request_amount ) as loan_request_amount_thai , sc_lon_m_contract.loan_request_amount , sc_lon_m_contract.loan_installment_amount , sc_lon_m_contract.begining_of_contract , sc_lon_m_contract.loan_type , sc_lon_m_contract.period_payment_amount , (select pka_com_function.fp_get_moneythai(sum(loan_request_amount)) from sc_lon_m_contract where loan_contract_no = sc_lon_m_contract.loan_contract_no /*WHERE*/ and loan_type = '29' ) as sum_loan_request_amount_thai , '!begining_of_contract_1!' as from_date , '!begining_of_contract_2!' as to_date from sc_lon_m_contract , sc_lon_m_rule where sc_lon_m_contract.loan_type = sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type and sc_lon_m_contract.create_loan_status = '1' and sc_lon_m_contract.loan_type = '29' --and sc_lon_m_contract.begining_of_contract between '01 ก.พ. 2023' and '28 ก.พ. 2023' /*WHERE*/ order by sc_lon_m_contract.membership_no /*รายงานตัวนี้ มีใช้ formatting rules ในรายงานเด้อ*/
